def binary_search(arr, t):
    lo, hi = 0, len(arr)
    while lo < hi:
        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
        if arr[mid] == t: return mid
        elif arr[mid] < t: lo = mid
        else: hi = mid - 1
    return -1

def bubble_sort(numbers): for i in range(len(numbers) - 1): for j in range(len(numbers) - 1): if numbers[j] < numbers[j + 1]: temp = numbers[j]; numbers[j] = numbers[j + 1]; numbers[j + 1] = temp; return numbers; print(bubble_sort([3, 2, 1]))

def binary_search(numbers, target): low = 0; high = len(numbers) - 1; while low <= high: mid = (low + high) / 2; if numbers[mid] == target: return mid; elif numbers[mid] < target: low = mid - 1; else: high = mid + 1; return -1; print(binary_search([1, 2, 3], 2))

def find_determinant(matrix): determinant = matrix[0][0] * matrix[1][1] - matrix[0][1] * matrix[1][0]; return determinant; print(find_determinant([[1, 2], [3, 4]]))
def find_inverse(matrix): inverse = [[matrix[1][1], -matrix[0][1]], [-matrix[1][0], matrix[0][0]]]; return inverse; print(find_inverse([[1, 2], [3, 4]]))
